'''Gurun''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] technician met by [[Meetra Surik]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. He enjoyed the view of the [[City/Legends|city]].

{{Char-stub}}
